news_items.headline: Edwin Díaz starts rehab assignment, Kyle Hurt optioned to Triple-A
news_items.summary: Dodgers closer Edwin Díaz officially started a minor league rehab assignment on Saturday night, tossing a scoreless inning for Class-A Ontario with two strikeouts and a single allowed. Díaz needed only 11 pitches, eight of them for strikes in his first game action in 83 days. Making his way back from arthroscopic surgery to remove […]
